conformsTo.description: Per-record schema URI for export-compat checks (RO-Crate compatible).

annotation_id.description: ann_ + first 16 hex chars of sha256_hex(canonical_json(stable_tuple)).

source_id.description: Canonical corpus source_id (e.g. doi_10_1097_fpc_..., pmid_12345, sha_abcdef...).

id.description: Stable agent identifier per urn:agent:<type>:<name>[@<version>] convention.

instrument.description: RO-Crate SoftwareApplication used by the agent (the tool, not the actor).

scope.description: Free-form scope tag (e.g. raw_fetch, parse, claim_extraction, verdict, annotation).

tool.description: Optional free-form tool name (callsite-defined; informational, not for identity).

result.description: Output reference (flat namespace per OpenTelemetry GenAI). Sidecar for >4KB outputs.

output_uri.description: Direct URI to a sidecar output (corpus:// or project-root:// or repo://).

source_content_hash.description: Hash of the source bytes the annotation was made against (freshness gate).

asserted_at.description: When the agent asserted this (world time). UTC ISO-8601 with Z suffix.

endTime.description: Alias for asserted_at — RO-Crate export compatibility.

recorded_at.description: Corpus-writer-assigned append time (transaction time). UTC ISO-8601.

idempotency_key.description: Canonical-JSON of the stable tuple. Used to derive annotation_id.
